zh.lifeSummary: 當Wallerand DE COUCY於1010年出生在法國皮卡迪艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可時，他的父親Albéric de Coucy30歲，母親Adèle D AMIENS22歲。他於1033年與Emma DE THOUROTTE結婚。他們至少是6個女兒的父母。他去世於1079年享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: COUCY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cornwall and Devon): nickname from Middle English couch(e) ‘hump, hunch’, used for a hunchback. In Cornwall and Devon it is usually pronounced as Cooch.
English (Cornwall and Devon): variant of   Gooch  .

English (Cornwall and Devon): from Middle English coche, couche ‘bed, couch, tablecloth’ (Old French couche, culche). It could have been a metonymic occupational name for someone who made such items or a nickname for a lazy individual. Alternatively, it could have been applied to someone who produced couchwork, a luxurious embroidery in which gold or silver thread and jewels were sewn into satin or silk robes.

variants.name: Gooch
meanings: English (East Anglia): from the rare Middle English personal name Goche (also found as Joche). It was current in East Anglia from the early 12th to the early 13th centuries as a variant of Anglo-Norman French Go(s)ce, Jo(s)ce, a pet form of Old French Goscelin.
English: alternatively, a nickname from Anglo-Norman French gouge (from Latin gobio), the nominative form of Old French goujon (from Latin gobionem) ‘gudgeon’, perhaps for a gullible person.

Welsh: in southwestern England, possibly an Anglicized form of Welsh coch, goch ‘red(-haired)’, though the sound change is irregular. Compare Gough . It may also be a variant of Cornish and Welsh Couch , with the same meaning.

variants.name: Gush
meanings: English (Devon and Dorset): probably a variant of Gudge, itself a variant of Couch or Gooch .

variants.name: Coach
meanings: Possibly also an Americanized form of French Canadian or French   Coache  .

en.lifeSummary: When Wallerand DE COUCY was born in 1010, in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, France, his father, Albéric de Coucy, was 30 and his mother, Adèle D AMIENS, was 22. He married Emma DE THOUROTTE in 1033. They were the parents of at least 6 daughters. He died in 1079, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wallerand DE COUCY est né en 1010, à Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, France, son père, Albéric de Coucy, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Adèle D AMIENS, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Emma DE THOUROTTE en 1033. Ils ont eu au moins 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1079, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Wallerand DE COUCY 1010 in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Albéric de Coucy 30 und seine Mutter Adèle D AMIENS 22. Er hat 1033 Emma DE THOUROTTE geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Töchter. Er starb 1079 im Alter von 69 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Wallerand DE COUCY è nato il nel 1010 nel Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Albéric de Coucy, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Adèle D AMIENS, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Emma DE THOUROTTE nel 1033. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figlie. Morì nel 1079, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Wallerand DE COUCYが1010年にフランスピカーディエイスンコウシ-レ-チaテアウ-アウフリクで生まれた時，父Albéric de Coucyは30歳，母Adèle D AMIENSは22歳であった。1033年にEmma DE THOUROTTEと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の娘の親であった。彼は1079年に69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Wallerand DE COUCY(이)가 1010년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 코우시-레-cha테오-오프리크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Albéric de Coucy(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Adèle D AMIENS(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1033년 Emma DE THOUROTTE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1079년 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Wallerand DE COUCY nasceu em 1010, em Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, França, seu pai, Albéric de Coucy, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Adèle D AMIENS, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma DE THOUROTTE em 1033. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1079, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wallerand DE COUCY родился в 1010 г. в местности коуси-ле-чaто-ауффрику, эисн, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Albéric de Coucy было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Adèle D AMIENS, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma DE THOUROTTE в 1033 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1079 г. в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Wallerand DE COUCY nació en 1010, en Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Albéric de Coucy, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Adèle D AMIENS, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Emma DE THOUROTTE en 1033. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijas. Murió en 1079, a la edad de 69 años.
